title: WorkflowModuleBinding
description: Template-level execution and evaluation binding from a reusable workflow module to the current atomic task library.

binding_id.description: Unique execution-binding ID for one concrete atomic-task binding under a workflow module.

module_id.description: Workflow module ID defined in the core module library. Multiple bindings may share the same module_id.

backing_task_id.description: Atomic task ID used to execute this module in the current task library.

task_dir.description: Task directory providing the current execution binding.

description_template.description: Parameterized description with placeholders aligned to parameter names.

default_parameter_values.description: Default or seed parameter values inferred from the current bound task instance.

observable_templates.description: Parameterized success signals with placeholders aligned to parameter names.

seed_example.description: One concrete instantiation exported from the current bound task library. This is illustrative, not fixed benchmark content.

writes_memory.description: Memory keys expected to be written by the current bound task.

writes_env.description: Environment state paths expected to be written by the current bound task.
